meta.summary: Truvari 5.4.0 runtime for structural variant benchmarking, merging, harmonization, annotation, and VCF analysis.
meta.description: Truvari 5.4.0 runtime for structural variant benchmarking, merging, harmonization, annotation, and VCF analysis.

test: truvari version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Truvari v5.4.0' >/dev/null && truvari version -v 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Truvari 5.4.0' >/dev/null && truvari -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Structural Variant Benchmarking and Annotation' >/dev/null && truvari bench -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Structural variant benchmarking tool' >/dev/null && truvari bench -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--base BASE' >/dev/null && truvari collapse -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Structural variant collapser' >/dev/null && truvari anno -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Truvari annotations' >/dev/null && truvari anno svinfo -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Adds SVTYPE and SVLEN INFO fields' >/dev/null && truvari phab -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Wrapper around MAFFT' >/dev/null && truvari refine -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Automated Truvari bench result refinement' >/dev/null

python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; assert md.version("truvari") == "5.4.0"; assert md.version("bwapy") == "0.1.4"; import truvari, edlib, intervaltree, joblib, numpy, pandas, psutil, pyabpoa, pysam, tabix, pywfa, rich, bwapy; print("truvari-runtime-ok", md.version("pysam"), md.version("pyabpoa"), md.version("pywfa"), md.version("bwapy"))' | grep -F 'truvari-runtime-ok' >/dev/null && python --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Python 3.11.15' >/dev/null && bcftools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'bcftools 1.23.1' >/dev/null && samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'samtools 1.23.1' >/dev/null && bgzip --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Version: 1.' >/dev/null && tabix --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Version: 1.' >/dev/null && mafft --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'v7.526' >/dev/null && (bwa 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Version: 0.7.19' >/dev/null && test -s /opt/truvari/share/doc/truvari/README.md && test -s /opt/truvari/share/doc/truvari/source.txt && test -s /opt/truvari/share/licenses/truvari/LICENSE

tmp=/tmp/taf-truvari-bench-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python /opt/truvari/share/testdata/make_sv_fixture.py "$tmp"; samtools faidx "$tmp/ref.fa"; for v in base comp collapse; do bgzip -c "$tmp/$v.vcf" > "$tmp/$v.vcf.gz"; tabix -f -p vcf "$tmp/$v.vcf.gz"; done; truvari bench -b "$tmp/base.vcf.gz" -c "$tmp/comp.vcf.gz" -f "$tmp/ref.fa" -o "$tmp/bench" --passonly --pctseq 0 --sizemin 50 --sizefilt 50 > "$tmp/bench.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/bench/summary.json"; test -s "$tmp/bench/tp-base.vcf.gz"; test -s "$tmp/bench/fp.vcf.gz"; grep -F '"TP-base": 1' "$tmp/bench/summary.json" >/dev/null; grep -F '"FP": 1' "$tmp/bench/summary.json" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-truvari-collapse-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python /opt/truvari/share/testdata/make_sv_fixture.py "$tmp"; bgzip -c "$tmp/collapse.vcf" > "$tmp/collapse.vcf.gz"; tabix -f -p vcf "$tmp/collapse.vcf.gz"; truvari collapse -i "$tmp/collapse.vcf.gz" -o "$tmp/collapsed.vcf" -c "$tmp/removed.vcf" --pctseq 0 --sizemin 50 --passonly > "$tmp/collapse.log" 2>&1; grep -F 'dup_a' "$tmp/collapsed.vcf" >/dev/null; grep -F 'dup_b' "$tmp/removed.vcf" >/dev/null; grep -F 'CollapseId=' "$tmp/collapsed.vcf" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-truvari-anno-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python /opt/truvari/share/testdata/make_sv_fixture.py "$tmp"; truvari anno svinfo "$tmp/anno.vcf" -o "$tmp/annotated.vcf" > "$tmp/anno.log" 2>&1; grep -F 'SVTYPE=DEL;SVLEN=80' "$tmp/annotated.vcf" >/dev/null; grep -F 'Finished svinfo' "$tmp/anno.log" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Truvari
upstream.citation: English et al. 2022, Truvari: refined structural variant comparison preserves allelic diversity
